_comment: Copy to deploy.config.json (gitignored) and set your values. Read by scripts/deploy.mjs and forwarded to cdk as --context k=v (CLI --context flags override). Keys are cdk context flags; `_`-prefixed keys are ignored. Omit a key to take its default. Do NOT set appUrl; deploy.mjs derives it from the live CloudFront distribution and closes the CORS loop for you.
_athena_default: Minimal Athena-mode deploy: just set senderEmail.
_aurora_optional: Aurora mode adds a VPC + Aurora (advanced analytics). To reuse an existing VPC set analyticsVpcId + analyticsVpcSubnetType and createVpcEndpoints=false.
_imageGen: REQUIRED for /battle image generation-out with EXTERNAL providers (OpenAI, FAL): the ARN of a Secrets Manager secret holding a JSON object of provider keys ({"OPENAI_API_KEY":"...","FAL_KEY":"..."}). Without it the premium (imageGen:true) processor still gets the image guardrail but CANNOT authenticate to a provider, so image battles silently honest-empty. Alternatively export OPENAI_API_KEY / FAL_KEY in the deploy shell.
